body:
# What's new in 6.20.0

## Miller and AI

Miller now treats AI agents as first-class users. Everything an agent needs to drive Miller well — discovering what exists, learning your data's shape, validating expressions before running them, and recovering from errors — is now a built-in, structured feature of the `mlr` binary, packaged for MCP-speaking agents (Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, ...) via a one-line setup:

```
claude mcp add miller -- mlr mcp
```

See the new [Miller and AI](https://miller.readthedocs.io/en/latest/ai/) docs page for the quick start. The pieces, all usable individually from the command line:

* Machine-readable help catalog, `mlr help --as-json`: by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2099, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2106
* JSON capability index and `mlr which` intent router by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2107
* Structured verb options, with enum value-sets by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2111
* Structured error output, `--errors-json`, with hints and did-you-mean suggestions by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2113
* DSL validate/dry-run, `mlr put --explain` / `mlr filter --explain` by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2131
* New `mlr describe` verb: field names, types, cardinality, and value domains of your data in one pass by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2132
* New `mlr mcp` MCP server and agent playbook, with a `--no-shell` sandbox flag by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2133
* Roadmap doc by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2103; "Miller and AI" docs page by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2134

## A first-class bytes type in the DSL

* New `bytes` type with `b"..."` literals and base64/hex codecs by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2122

## More features

* New `tail -n +N` and `head -n -N` options by @farnoy in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2071
* Shell tab-completion for bash and zsh by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2096
* Long-overdue `--md` flag by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2100
* Windows-arm64 releases by @teo-tsirpanis in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2127

## Bug fixes

* Fix masked unset-on-array error path (along with govet lint findings) by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2129

## Documentation

* CSV and JSON troubleshooting tips by @dashitongzhi in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2123, with page-refactor by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2128
* Document time-conversion thread safety by @dashitongzhi in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2115
* PNG graphics in perf docs for issue-2084 perf mods by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2095

## Internals

* golangci-lint CI workflow by @dashitongzhi in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2076
* Lint fixes bringing staticcheck and errcheck to zero by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2108, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2110, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2112, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2130
* Strip dead code from pkg/ by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2121
* CI/actions updates by @johnkerl in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2119 and by @dependabot in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2101, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2102, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2104, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2105, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2114, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2116, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2118, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2124, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2125, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2126
* Dependency bumps by @dependabot in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2117, https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2120

## New Contributors

* @farnoy made their first contribution in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2071
* @dashitongzhi made their first contribution in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2076
* @teo-tsirpanis made their first contribution in https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/pull/2127

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/johnkerl/miller/compare/v6.19.0...v6.20.0
name: v6.20.0
